settings.createTable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settings (key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL)
settings.set: INSERT INTO settings (key, value) VALUES (?, ?) ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value
settings.get: SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = ?

saveSlots.createTable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS save_slots (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, slot_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, save_version INTEGER NOT NULL, save_data TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL)
saveSlots.set: INSERT INTO save_slots (slot_name, save_version, save_data, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, datetime('now')) ON CONFLICT(slot_name) DO UPDATE SET save_version = excluded.save_version, save_data = excluded.save_data, updated_at = datetime('now')
saveSlots.get: SELECT save_data FROM save_slots WHERE slot_name = ?
